'''Toosma''' was the fourth and largest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Tyrius/Legends|Tyrius]] in the [[Tyrius system/Legends|Tyrius system]]. Located in the [[Savareen sector/Legends|Savareen sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a yellow-orange [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] and had a total of 18 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="SEPG">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

The moons of the planet were occasionally mined by [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] arms manufacturers.<ref name="SEPG" />
